query: SpaceX Falcon 9 launch schedule June 2026, upcoming launches
answer:
I now have comprehensive data. Here is my full synthesis:

---

# SpaceX Falcon 9 Launch Schedule — June 2026 & Upcoming

## Overview

As of June 6, 2026, SpaceX has already completed **65 Falcon 9/Falcon Heavy launches** in 2026 (January 1 – June 6), maintaining a remarkable cadence of approximately **one launch every 2.4 days** (~12.7 launches/month). There are **15 Falcon launches listed for June 2026** and **117 additional Falcon missions** manifested from July 2026 onward.

## Recent Completed Launches (Late May – Early June 2026)

|------|---------|-----|--------|
| Jun 4, 2026 | Starlink Group 10-43 | SLC-40, Cape Canaveral | ✅ Success |
| Jun 3, 2026 | Starlink Group 17-47 | SLC-4E, Vandenberg | ✅ Success |
| May 30, 2026 | Starlink Group 17-41 | SLC-4E, Vandenberg | ✅ Success |
| May 29, 2026 | Starlink Group 10-53 | SLC-40, Cape Canaveral | ✅ Success |
| May 26, 2026 | Starlink Group 17-37 | SLC-4E, Vandenberg | ✅ Success |
| May 25, 2026 | Starlink Group 10-47 | SLC-40, Cape Canaveral | ✅ Success |
| May 21, 2026 | Starlink Group 10-31 | SLC-40, Cape Canaveral | ✅ Success |
| May 20, 2026 | Starlink Group 17-42 | SLC-4E, Vandenberg | ✅ Success |
| May 15, 2026 | Dragon CRS-2 SpX-34 | SLC-40, Cape Canaveral | ✅ Success |
| May 12, 2026 | NROL-172 | SLC-4E, Vandenberg | ✅ Success |

| Jun 8, 10:07 | **Starlink Group 10-35** | 29 Starlink | SLC-40, Cape Canaveral | LEO |
| Jun 10, 14:00 | **Starlink Group 17-44** | 24 Starlink | SLC-4E, Vandenberg | LEO |

| Jun 14, 14:00 | **Starlink Group 17-54** | 24 Starlink | SLC-4E, Vandenberg | LEO |

## June 2026 — "To Be Determined" (date TBD, listed as June 30 placeholder)

| Mission | Customer | Pad | Orbit |
|---------|----------|-----|-------|
| **BlueBird Block 2 #3-5** | AST SpaceMobile | SLC-40, Cape Canaveral | LEO |
| **Globalstar 2-R Mission 1 (x9)** | Globalstar | SLC-40, Cape Canaveral | LEO |
| **SDA Tranche 1 Tracking Layer A** | US Space Force/SDA | SLC-4E, Vandenberg | Polar |
| **SDA Tranche 1 Tracking Layer C** | US Space Force/SDA | SLC-4E, Vandenberg | Polar |
| **SDA Tranche 1 Tracking Layer E** | US Space Force/SDA | SLC-4E, Vandenberg | Polar |
| **SDA Tranche 1 Transport Layer A** | US Space Force/SDA | SLC-4E, Vandenberg | Polar |

> **Note:** Many of the TBD missions (especially the seven SDA missions) may slip into later months. The June 30 date is a placeholder indicating "sometime in June or later."

## Key Upcoming Missions Beyond June 2026

| Target Date | Mission | Vehicle | Details |
|-------------|---------|---------|---------|
| Jul 2026 | **BlueBird Block 2 #6-8** | Falcon 9 | AST SpaceMobile (LEO) |
| Jul 2026 | **Transporter 17** | Falcon 9 | Rideshare to SSO |
| Aug 2026 | **Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope** | **Falcon Heavy** | NASA flagship telescope to Sun-Earth L2 |
| Aug 2026 | **Dragon CRS-2 SpX-35** | Falcon 9 | ISS resupply |
| Sep 2026 | **Crew-13** | Falcon 9 | ISS crew rotation |
| Sep 2026 | **O3b mPower 11-13** | Falcon 9 | SES satellites (MEO) |
| Nov 2026 | **Griffin Mission One** | **Falcon Heavy** | Astrobotic lunar lander |
| Dec 2026 | **Blue Ghost Lunar Lander Mission 2** | Falcon 9 | Firefly lunar mission |
| Dec 2026 | **Nova-C IM-3** | Falcon 9 | Intuitive Machines lunar mission |
| Dec 2026 | **Telesat Lightspeed 1** | Falcon 9 | LEO broadband constellation |

## Launch Cadence & Statistics

- **65 Falcon launches completed** in 2026 through June 6 (156 days)
- **Average cadence: 1 launch every 2.4 days** (~12.7/month)
- **Two active pads** for Falcon 9: SLC-40 (Cape Canaveral) and SLC-4E (Vandenberg), with LC-39A used for Falcon Heavy
- **Alternating pattern**: SpaceX is alternating between East Coast (Group 10-xx) and West Coast (Group 17-xx) Starlink launches roughly every 2-3 days
- **117 additional Falcon missions** manifested from July 2026 onward (many with placeholder dates)
- Dominant payload: Starlink constellation deployment continues to drive the majority of launches

## Data Sources

All data retrieved from **The Space Devs Launch Library 2 API** (`ll.thespacedevs.com/2.2.0/`) and cross-validated with **RocketLaunch.Live API** (`fdo.rocketlaunch.live`), accessed June 6, 2026.

key_facts: SpaceX has completed 65 Falcon 9/Heavy launches in 2026 (Jan 1 – Jun 6), averaging one launch every 2.4 days (~12.7 per month).
Five Falcon 9 launches are confirmed 'Go for Launch' in the next week: Starlink 17-43 (Jun 7), Starlink 10-35 (Jun 8), Starlink 17-44 (Jun 10), Starlink 10-54 (Jun 12), and Starlink 17-54 (Jun 14).
15 total Falcon launches are listed for June 2026, including 5 with firm dates and 10 with TBD/placeholder dates (Jun 30).
TBD June missions include: BlueBird Block 2 #3-5 (AST SpaceMobile), Globalstar 2-R Mission 1, seven SDA Tranche 1 missions, and Sirius SXM-11.
Starlink Group 17-43 (Jun 7) will carry 21 Starlink satellites plus 2 US military Starshield satellites.
SpaceX alternates launches between SLC-40 (Cape Canaveral, FL) and SLC-4E (Vandenberg, CA) every 2-3 days.
117 additional Falcon missions are manifested from July 2026 onward.
Key upcoming high-profile missions: Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope (Falcon Heavy, Aug 2026), Crew-13 (Sep 2026), Griffin Mission One lunar lander (Falcon Heavy, Nov 2026).
Most recent completed launches: Starlink 10-43 (Jun 4) and Starlink 17-47 (Jun 3), both successful.
Dragon CRS-2 SpX-34 ISS resupply mission launched successfully on May 15, 2026.
